title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell, CEO of Cursor, argues that software engineering is transitioning from humans writing code to managing teams of autonomous agents. He cites data showing agent requests exploding in 2025, 30% of Cursor PRs being fully agent-developed, and enterprise AI-generated code rising from 15% to 75% in one year.
